dialogs.speaker: Sam
text: Hi! I'm Sam. I do the designs, illustrations, ships and a little bit of the story writing!
You can draw my characters however you like, including shipping and NSFW, etc.
[color=#ff30dc]Please treat my OCs with the worst kindness. I loveeee seeing them suffer! [/color]

dialogs.speaker: Pink Truck V
text: Cooking convulted lore and spaghetti code.
